title: alnus jorullensis subsp. jorullensis
intro: Alnus jorullensis subsp. jorullensis, also known as Jorullensis White Alder, is a plant species that belongs to the family Betulaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Alnus jorullensis subsp. jorullensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against infections, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
